questions.question: The world's first Pandemic Agreement was adopted during which session of the World Health Assembly held in May 2025?
According to the report titled “India Revives ₹44,000 Crore Plan to Boost Defence Manufacturing”, published in 2025, what is the primary purpose of this plan?
In 2022, which of the following states made headlines for having discovered the oldest Iron Age site in the Indian subcontinent?
PM Modi’s review of NTEP in May 2025 urged volunteers called _____________ to adopt AI tools for patient follow‑up.
Which Indian State/Union Territory inaugurated modern sports facilities, including chess centres and a snooker hall, in 2025?
On May 27, 2025, the Rajasthan High Court issued a directive regarding FIRs and financial transactions. What was one of the key mandates?
questions.option_1: Courts must report cash transactions over ₹2 lakh to the Income Tax Department.
questions.option_2: FIRs can only be filed for criminal offenses, not civil disputes.
questions.option_3: All property transactions must be conducted through digital payments.
questions.option_4: All FIRs must be approved by a magistrate before registration.

questions.question: Which Indian athlete set a new national record in the 200m sprint at the 2025 Asian Athletics Championships?
Where was the bilateral naval exercise SLINEX 24 conducted between India and Sri Lanka in December 2024?
Which of the following agencies collaborated on India’s first Quantum Key Distribution over a Multi-Core Fibre in 2025?
Who among the following threw 19.59 m to bag Silver medal in Shot Put at Asian U-18 Athletics Championship in April 2025?
Who among the following has been appointed as the International Trade Negotiator by China in April 2025?
Which force will get the Ashwini radar system under the ₹2,906-crore deal signed in March 2025?
In April 2025, DOT announced funding of two specialised national testbeds for 6G R&D. One focuses on THz communication; which domain does the other explore?
Which advanced radar systems are being deployed under a ₹5,700-crore contract signed in March 2024 and operational from April 2025 to strengthen India's air defence network?
As per the Ministry of Defence’s Year End Review 2024 (PIB), what is the number of C-295 aircraft to be indigenously built by TASL in India?
As of December 2024, what is the age eligibility of player to avail facility of Retired Sportsperson Empowerment Training (RESET) Programme?
What was the theme for National Safety Day, observed on 4 March 2025?
questions.option_4: Safety & Well-being Crucial for Viksit Bharat

questions.question: Who is the Governor of the Reserve Bank of India as of May 2025?
Who among the following was the runner-up defeated by Viktor Axelsen in his third India Open victory in the 2025 India Open Badminton Tournament in January 2025?
In 2025, who launched 'Srjanam', India's first indigenous automated bio medical waste treatment plant?
In which event, at The Ten 2025 athletics meet in San Juan Capistrano, USA, did Gulveer Singh break his own national record in March 2025?
Which country ranked 10ᵗʰ in the Climate Change Performance Index (CCPI) 2025 report released at the annual UN climate conference in Baku?
What minimum legal practice experience did the Supreme Court mandate on 20 May 2025 for applicants to the Civil Judge (Junior Division) post?
questions.option_1: Four years of legal practice experience
questions.option_2: One year of legal practice experience
questions.option_3: Two years of legal practice experience
questions.option_4: Three years of legal practice experience

questions.question: In which year was the 2030 Agenda for Sustainable Development adopted by the United Nations Member States?
In which of the following years was Delhi Metro Rail Corporation established?
